name: One Sided (?) Love - Dr. Paradigm
description:
Paradigm has a crush on his aquaintance, but they don't seem to catch any of his painfully obvious signs.

I got playing a few Guilty Gear games and watched a but of the anime so I can put just a lil more effort into this one. This is somewhat of a request, I'd totally do a enemies to lovers.

Takes place before Xrd's story.
creator: zephyrultra
